# Committed toy dataset (generated by scripts/run_all.py)

- `events.jsonl`: roughly 2-5k events, every injected incident findable by eye
- `agent_cards.jsonl`: the card re-registration stream, injected card attacks included
- `embeddings.npz`: precomputed embeddings, so cloners reproduce the eval
  bit-for-bit without downloading the model (PLANNING.md §2.1)

Regenerate with `python scripts/run_all.py --out data/sample/`.
